title: Code of Conduct
text: aim maintain open, friendly, professional environment within texanshootR project. Everyone taking part (contributors, maintainers, users) feel welcome respected, regardless background, identity, experience level.

title: Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior helps create good environment: Communicating clearly respectfully open different opinions approaches Offering constructive feedback Helping others learn contribute Staying focused collaboration shared goals Examples behavior acceptable: Personal attacks insulting language Disrespectful dismissive comments Sharing private information without consent form harassment hostility toward others

title: Code of Conduct
text: Project maintainers responsible clarifying standards acceptable behavior taking fair action necessary. may edit, remove, reject contributions violate Code Conduct disrupt collaboration.

title: Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct applies project spaces, including discussions, issues, pull requests, community interactions related texanshootR.

title: Code of Conduct
text: experience witness behavior violates Code Conduct, please contact maintainer privately. Reports handled discretion, maintainers take appropriate action needed.

title: Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant, version 2.1, simplified better fit tone open scientific software project. Contact: gilles.colling051@gmail.com

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: contributions texanshootR content, code: new messages, new life events, new achievements, new cosmetics. package built can extend corpus dropping YAML inst/ without touching R source. participating project agree abide Code Conduct.

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: Read MESSAGE_SCHEMA.md end--end. schema contract. Pick category file inst/messages/ create new one. One file per category keeps PR diffs readable. Every entry must carry least one fallacy tag lives loading, blip, derived_escalation, ultra_rare, event phase. Phases like banner, promotion, reviewer, daily, state_transition exempt — ’re institutional ceremony, methodological mechanics. Tone: deadpan everywhere. package never explains joke inside output. “lol”, winks, scare quotes, moral warnings. Reread draft reject anything reads meme. Run validator:
code: devtools::load_all() texanshootR::validate_messages()

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: Schema field reference live MESSAGE_SCHEMA.md “Event schema”. Effects must use keys vocab_effects stay within [-0.5, +0.5]. validator caps load.

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: inst/achievements/v1.yaml single bundled file v1. entry needs trigger function defined R/achievements.R. Keep triggers pure (run + meta , logical ) side-effect-free. Visible achievements describe progression. Hidden achievements describe discovery — name: "???" hint: ~ unlocked.

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: inst/cosmetics/v1.yaml. entry declares slot small ASCII overlay. overlay must change layout width characters desyncs mascot frame.

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: R source follows rules: Two-space indent, tabs. Snake_case everything. Avoid heavy dependencies. Core deps limited cli, yaml, jsonlite, withr, base packages. Output functions gate requireNamespace(). Never write outside tempdir() examples tests. consent-gated save dir single place persistent state lives.

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: Tests must hermetic — run temp save dir, animations , life events disabled, quiet output. See tests/testthat/helper-isolated.R.
code: devtools::test() R CMD check --as-cran

title: Contributing to texanshootR
text: Keep PRs small. One category file one feature per PR ideal. Run validate_messages() devtools::test() opening. Don’t introduce new vocab_phases, vocab_tags, vocab_effects values without flagging change PR description.

title: texanshootR
text: Mission. contribute dubious research questionable p-values. day age publish perish reigns king, lone shooter helps predicament. roguelike-themed framework exploratory linear-model search R.

title: texanshootR
text: Texas sharpshooter fires side barn, walks paints target around densest cluster bullet holes. shoot() automates firing — across predictor subsets, transformations, interactions, outlier exclusions, subgroup splits — surfaces defensible result. nothing clears p ≤ 0.05, run escalates derived metrics, done anyway. now banner . Every run deterministic given seed, seed, R version, package version, hash search grid recorded returned object — audit trail honest even intent .
code: library(texanshootR)  run <- shoot(mtcars) print(run) summary(run)

title: texanshootR
text: finished run tx_run. Six generators turn something shippable: writes tempdir() default returns file path invisibly. Override output_dir = options(texanshootR.output_dir = ...).
code: manuscript(run)         # IMRaD draft, Methods that match the *winning* spec preprint(run)           # arXiv-flavoured, with the limitations section pre-hedged presentation(run)       # 8-slide deck (slide 7 contains the only honest figure) graphical_abstract(run) # the figure your PI will retweet reviewer_response(run)  # opens with "we thank the reviewer for their thoughtful comments" funding(run)            # the next grant, citing the just-shipped finding

text: Every run feeds persistent profile, joke work without progression. State persists tools::R_user_dir("texanshootR", "data"). first interactive save prompts writing anything disk. Opt entirely options(texanshootR.save_enabled = FALSE).
code: career()        # level, runs, favourite method, opaque scores achievements()  # 20 unlockable badges; hidden ones show as ??? wardrobe()      # equipped cosmetic slots (hat, badge, cloak, poncho, lanyard)

title: Message Schema
text: texanshootR message engine designed scale 5,000–10,000 entries without code change. New messages added dropping YAML inst/messages/<category>.yaml (, life-events, inst/events/<category>.yaml). package validates every entry schema load time via validate_messages(). document canonical contract contributors.

title: Message Schema
text: One file per category keeps PR diffs readable. Files inside inst/messages/ share schema ; inst/events/ files use Event schema (separate, also ).
code: inst/messages/ ├── blip.yaml                 # 1-3 word blip-stream filler ├── loading_general.yaml      # full sentence loading messages ├── derived_metrics.yaml      # desperation-escalation phase only ├── promotion.yaml            # promotion committee + advancement ├── reviewer.yaml             # Reviewer 2 encounters ├── state_transition.yaml     # one-shot mascot-state transitions └── banner.yaml               # startup banner pool  inst/events/ └── life.yaml                 # random life-event encounters

title: Message Schema
code: - id: <unique_snake_case_id>          # required   text: "string"                       # required, dead-serious   tags: [tag1, tag2, ...]              # required, ≥ 1 fallacy tag   rarity: common | uncommon | rare | legendary   # required   trigger_phase: <vocab_phases entry>  # required   career_min: ~ | "Junior Researcher" | "Postdoc" | "Senior Scientist" | "PI"   model_family_affinity: [glm, mixed, gam, ...]  # optional   mascot_state_affinity: [composed, uncertain, anxious, desperate, resolved]   combo_chain:     start: <chain_id> | ~              # this message *opens* a chain     next:  <chain_id> | ~              # this message *follows* a chain   requires: [pkg1, pkg2]               # optional; suppressed if any pkg missing

title: Message Schema
text: id — unique across entire registry. Convention: <phase>_<topic>_<NNN> meaningful slug. Validator rejects duplicates. text — line shown user. Must read professional, dead-serious output. “lol”, emoji, scare quotes wink joke. tags — least one fallacy tag first 23 entries vocab_tags. Thematic tags (ecology, ml, …) may added addition. Fallacy tags run engine connects messages methodological sin modelled. rarity — controls base sampling weight. relative scale common = 1000, uncommon = 100, rare = 10, legendary = 1. trigger_phase — select_message() phase draw entry. See vocab_phases. message ever fires phase.

title: Message Schema
text: career_min — minimum career level required draw message. ~ (YAML null) means minimum. Useful unlocking sophisticated language higher career tiers. model_family_affinity — list model families message pairs (glm, lm, mixed, gam, bayesian, …). caller provides context family, messages non-empty affinities must intersect . Empty / missing means universal. mascot_state_affinity — list mascot states message appropriate . Used gate desperate-feeling messages (mascot_state_affinity: [anxious, desperate]) don’t appear calm phases run. start: <id> declares message opens chain named <id>. drawn, engine remembers <id> combo_state. next: <id> declares message follows chain named <id>. combo_state matches, follow-ups receive 10× weight boost exempt recency suppression. Chains build sequences like correlating → causating exploring → discovering → interpreting. requires — list R packages must available. missing message dropped candidate pool.

title: Message Schema
text: Life events two-part roguelike encounters fire ~1/6 runs. schema: Effect keys must come vocab_effects. Numeric magnitudes interpreted multiplicative throughput / search_budget additive otherwise. Validator caps effect [-0.5, +0.5] single event dominate run.
code: - id: <unique_snake_case_id>          # required   event_text: "string"                 # required, the EVENT: line   consequence_text: "string"           # required, second line   tags: [admin, ...]                   # required   rarity: common | uncommon | rare | legendary   # required   career_min: ~ | <career level>       # optional   display_phase: any | early | mid | late | desperation   effects:                             # optional; vocab_effects keys     throughput: -0.15     typo_probability: 0.10

title: Message Schema
text: Run tests / CI branch touches registry. validator enforces: Required fields present. Vocabulary membership: trigger_phase ∈ vocab_phases, rarity ∈ {common, uncommon, rare, legendary}, career_min ∈ vocab_careers ∪ {NA}, tags ⊆ vocab_tags, mascot_state_affinity ⊆ vocab_mascot_states. Every message carries least one fallacy tag. Unique ids across entire registry. combo_chain.next references known combo_chain.start ids.
code: texanshootR::validate_messages()

title: Message Schema
text: Deadpan everywhere. text funniest sounds like output real piece statistical software. Avoid “satire”, “lol”, winks, scare quotes, meta-commentary. Professional polish absurdity. Reject draft reads meme. Reject draft reads moralizing. Concrete abstract. “Subsampling environmentally noisy observations…” beats “statistics…” — specificity reads serious software. Short sentences. Loading lines rarely exceed 80 characters. Blips 1–3 words. Tag everything. single fallacy tag enough better. Tags engine builds run coherence.

title: Message Schema
text: Drop new YAML file inst/messages/<category>.yaml. need new trigger_phase, add R/vocab.R’s vocab_phases first. Run texanshootR::validate_messages() locally — returns parsed registry surfaces errors file + entry index. Send PR. ready defend entry risks breaking deadpan.

title: Inspect API unlock progress — progress
text: Three call modes: progress() – overview: career tier, gated-function lock map, achievement / wardrobe counts, -flight progress achievements public thresholds. progress("manuscript") – per-function card gated function. progress("ach_multiple_comparisons") – per-achievement card. Pairs static unlock requirement printed gated function's help page (e.g. ?presentation). help page documents requirement; progress() reports live state. Career-tier distance stays opaque design – qualitative tier names surfaced, never underlying score.

what: Run an exploratory model search — shoot
title: Run an exploratory model search — shoot
text: Fits battery candidate specifications across predictor subsets, transformations, interactions, outlier-removal seeds, subgroup seeds. Returns tx_run object summarising search highlighted specification.

title: Run an exploratory model search — shoot
code: shoot(   df,   formula = NULL,   seed = NULL,   escalate = TRUE,   depth = c("default", "demo"),   ... )

title: Run an exploratory model search — shoot
text: df data frame. formula Optional formula. NULL, first numeric column used outcome columns predictors. seed Integer seed. NULL, random seed generated stored returned run. escalate Logical. Allow derived-metric escalation phase main search produces spec p <= 0.05. Defaults TRUE; package leans parody. depth "default" full search; "demo" single-fit smoke test used CRAN-safe examples. ... Reserved future arguments.

title: Run an exploratory model search — shoot
text: tx_run object (returned invisibly).

title: Package options for texanshootR — texanshootR-options
text: options read time use, changing takes effect immediately subsequent calls.

title: Package options for texanshootR — texanshootR-options
text: texanshootR.animations Logical. Enable terminal animations ANSI cursor effects. Default: TRUE. Forced non-interactive sessions terminal lacks ANSI support. texanshootR.output_dir Character NULL. Default directory output files. NULL falls back tempdir(). texanshootR.save_enabled Logical. Enable persistent career data. FALSE runs entirely memory. Default: TRUE. texanshootR.quiet Logical. Suppress status prints output functions. Default: FALSE. texanshootR.event_rate Numeric [0, 1]. Per-run probability life-event encounter. Default: 1/6. texanshootR.life_events Logical. Enable life-event encounters runs. Default: TRUE.

what: texanshootR: Roguelike-Themed Framework for Exploratory Model Search — texanshootR-package
title: texanshootR: Roguelike-Themed Framework for Exploratory Model Search — texanshootR-package
text: structured, terminal-first interface exploratory linear-model search. main entry point shoot(), fits battery candidate specifications across predictor subsets, transformations, interactions, outlier-removal seeds. Persistent career state tracks run history, awards achievements, unlocks output generators (manuscript(), preprint(), presentation(), reviewer_response(), graphical_abstract(), funding()).

title: texanshootR: Roguelike-Themed Framework for Exploratory Model Search — texanshootR-package

title: texanshootR 0.2.0 (planned)
text: output generators gated career tier. Calling locked function returns deadpan status block; function otherwise usable tier reached. Unlocks persistent across sessions via existing save state. Junior Researcher: shoot(), career(), achievements(), wardrobe(), run_log(), progress(), resets. Postdoc: manuscript(), preprint(). Senior Scientist: reviewer_response(), graphical_abstract(), presentation(). PI: funding(). progress(): HUD-style companion ?<fn>. Reads live save state prints functions unlocked, locked, next unlock requires. require_unlocked() (internal): single source truth gating. Signals tx_locked condition scripts fail loudly interactive callers can tryCatch(tx_locked = ...). Roxygen @description gated function carries static unlock requirement, ?presentation documents tier even function callable.

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: Initial release.

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: shoot(): exploratory linear-model search across predictor subsets, transformations, interactions, outlier-removal seeds, subgroup seeds. run_log(): returns persisted history recorded runs. Derived-metric escalation spec reaches p ≤ 0.05. Reproducibility: every run records seed, R version, package version, hash search grid.

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: career(): dashboard level, runs, favorite method, opaque qualitative scores. achievements(): registry visible hidden achievements unlock status. wardrobe(): ASCII cosmetic slots auto-equip unlocking achievement fires. Consent-gated save dir tools::R_user_dir("texanshootR", "data").

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: manuscript(), preprint(), presentation(), reviewer_response(), graphical_abstract(), funding(). Default output dir tempdir(); override output_dir = options(texanshootR.output_dir = ...).

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: reset_career(), reset_achievements(), reset_wardrobe(), reset_all(). Package options documented ?\texanshootR-options``.

title: texanshootR 0.1.0
text: validate_messages(): schema check bundled YAML message packs. vocab_*() family: enumerates vocabularies drive message selection effect application.
